KeyListEntries.name: Manage your focus and, optionally, cursor

KeyListEntry.name: focus-cycle-window-forward
KeyListEntry.description: Move focus to the next window within the workspace

KeyListEntry.name: focus-cycle-window-backward
KeyListEntry.description: Move focus to the previous window within the workspace

KeyListEntry.name: focus-cycle-workspace-forward
KeyListEntry.description: Move focus to the next workspace

KeyListEntry.name: focus-cycle-workspace-backward
KeyListEntry.description: Move focus to the previous workspace
